mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_packet (title, total_amount_cents, total_count, remain_amount_cents, remain_count, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{totalAmountCents}, #{totalCount}, #{remainAmountCents}, #{remainCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, total_amount_cents, total_count, remain_amount_cents, remain_count, created_at FROM red_packet WHERE id = #{id}
